normalization.ctr: divide by max CTR in blog/tool GSC cohort
normalization.regen: embedded in V109 qualityScore (already penalizes high regenRatio)
normalization.toolConversion: log1p(aggregated weighted clicks+entries across blogs) vs cohort max

decisions.note: Batch-only. Merge with en-internal-linking via growth-priority.json (topBlogs → priority, underperformingBlogs → weak).
